nodes.name: Send SMS: SMS #1: Referral Acknowledgment (WITH referrer name)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "Hey {{contact.first_name}}, {{text_formatter.1.result}} mentioned you might be looking into hurricane windows. I\u2019m with Reece, we took care of their home and I\u2019d love to help with yours. Want me to set up a quick in-home estimate?", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

nodes.name: Send SMS: SMS #2: Direct Booking CTA

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "Hi {{contact.first_name}}, just following up. You can grab a time for your free in-home estimate here: {{trigger_link.rNS8dHTklxYQaakVyBHo}}\n\nTakes about 90 minutes, we measure everything and give you exact numbers on the spot. No pressure, no obligation.", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'Email', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, subject: "Your friend thought we should connect", html: " Reece Windows & Doors
Here’s what to expect from your in-home estimate. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
Reece Windows & Doors
 

Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out — I understand you were referred to us, and that means a lot. Most of our best customers came to us the same way.

Here’s what we do differently at Reece:

We come to your home for a free 90-minute assessment. We measure every opening, evaluate your current windows against current Florida code, and give you an exact quote — not a range, not a ballpark. You’ll know precisely what it costs, what your insurance impact looks like, and what your home value gain would be.

No high-pressure sales. No surprises. And if we’re not the right fit, I’ll tell you that too.

If you’d like to get on the calendar, just reply to this email or text me back. I’ll find a time that works for your household.

Looking forward to it,

{{custom_values.rep_name}}

Reece Windows & Doors
Protecting South Florida families since 1972
{{location.address}}, {{location.city}}, {{location.state}} {{location.postal_code}}
Unsubscribe  •  © {{right_now.year}} {{location.name}}
", from: "randy@getreecewindows.com", fromName: "Randy Reece" }) }}

parameters.content:
## E.6 Referral Bridge
Translated from GHL workflow e3ad4b2f-8ef8-4978-aeec-9732a8db9fc1.
GHL triggers: inbound_webhook:Inbound Agentic Trigger

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 6 | Stubs: 2 | Brand-law: 0
